title: Applied Elemental
description: Adds Elemental Craft integration to Applied Energistics 2.
body:
## **📑 Overview**
This is a mod for [NeoForge].

It adds integration for [Elemental Craft] to [Applied Energistics 2][ae2].

Currently, it offers the following features:
- Element Storage Cells
- Portable Element Cells
- Element P2P Tunnel
- Element support for Import, Export, and Storage Busses
- Element support for Pattern Providers and Interfaces
- Terminal support for Element Holders

## **⏰ Changelog**
Everything related to versions and their release notes can be found in the [changelog].

## **🎓 License**
All rights reserved.
